mapper.sql: id, location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, size, image_url, event_name
id, location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, type, image_url, event_name
id, location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, image_url, event_name
id, name, location, description, favorite_food, favorite_weather, image_url, event_name
id, name, level, ingredients, buy_price, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, image_url, event_name
id, name, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, level, growth_time, seed_buy_price, seed_sell_price, image_url, event_name
id, name, location, price, energy, image_url, event_name, show_on_map
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fish_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM bird_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM bug_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM animal_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM cooking_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM flower_collections ORDER BY level, name
SELECT FROM crop_collections ORDER BY level, name
SELECT FROM forageable_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM cooking_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM flower_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM crop_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE name = #{name}

SELECT ci.id, ci.cooking_id, ci.ingredient_name, ci.quantity, ci.item_type, ci.item_id, CASE ci.item_type WHEN 'crop' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM crop_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'forageable' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM forageable_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'fish' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM fish_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'bug' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM bug_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'bird' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM bird_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'flower' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM flower_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) ELSE NULL END AS imageUrl FROM cooking_ingredients ci WHERE ci.cooking_id = #{cookingId} ORDER BY ci.id ASC
SELECT ci.id, ci.cooking_id, ci.ingredient_name, ci.quantity, ci.item_type, ci.item_id, NULL AS imageUrl FROM cooking_ingredients ci ORDER BY ci.cooking_id, ci.id ASC
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY id LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY id LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM cooking_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM flower_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM crop_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT count(*) FROM fish_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM bird_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM bug_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM animal_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM cooking_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM flower_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM crop_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM forageable_collections
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fish_collections (location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, size, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{location}, #{subLocation}, #{name}, #{level}, #{weather}, #{time}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{size}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO bug_collections (location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{location}, #{subLocation}, #{name}, #{level}, #{weather}, #{time}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO bird_collections (location, sub_location, name, level, weather, time, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, type, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{location}, #{subLocation}, #{name}, #{level}, #{weather}, #{time}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{type}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO animal_collections (name, location, description, favorite_food, favorite_weather, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{description}, #{favoriteFood}, #{favoriteWeather}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO cooking_collections (name, level, ingredients, buy_price, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{name}, #{level}, #{ingredients}, #{buyPrice}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO flower_collections (name, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, level, growth_time, seed_buy_price, seed_sell_price, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{name}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{level}, #{growthTime}, #{seedBuyPrice}, #{seedSellPrice}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})

INSERT INTO crop_collections (name, price_1, price_2, price_3, price_4, price_5, level, growth_time, seed_buy_price, seed_sell_price, image_url, event_name) VALUES (#{name}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3}, #{price4}, #{price5}, #{level}, #{growthTime}, #{seedBuyPrice}, #{seedSellPrice}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName})
INSERT INTO forageable_collections (name, location, price, energy, image_url, event_name, show_on_map) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{price}, #{energy}, #{imageUrl}, #{eventName}, #{showOnMap})
